descriptions: Added full codem-appearance (mAppearance) support — works on QBCore, Qbox, and ESX. Auto-detected or set with Config.Appearance = "codem-appearance".
Added Config.AllowCharacterDeletion (default true) — set to false to hide the delete button and block character deletion server-side.
Fixed rcore_clothing not applying rcore-exported skins on ESX.
Fixed ESX HUD, hunger/thirst, and the ambulance deathscreen staying broken after spawn until a manual revive. Weapon loadouts are now restored automatically on spawn.
Fixed skinchanger events conflicting with other appearance systems — the restore now only runs when skinchanger is your active appearance system.
